FindEntities - Annotation Interface in com.example.qualifier
Custom qualifier annotation used to indicate that a method is responsible for retrieving multiple entities from the database.
FindEntitiesSet - Annotation Interface in com.example.qualifier
Custom qualifier annotation used to indicate that a method is responsible for retrieving multiple entities as a Set from the database.
FindEntity - Annotation Interface in com.example.qualifier
Custom qualifier annotation used to indicate that a method is responsible for retrieving a single entity from the database.
